Get phylogenetic tree using neighbor-joining or maximum parsimony method. — get_phylo_tree
text: dna_aln DNA alignment object class DNAbin. snp_dist numeric matrix representing SNP distance sequences. See get_snp_dist_matrix useful function generate . method string indicating method use tree construction. Options "nj" (neighbor-joining) "pars" (maximum parsimony).

Perform clustering of isolates using a hard SNP distance cutoff. — get_tn_clusters_snp_thresh
text: snp_hclust object class hclust constructed SNP distance matrix. SNP distance matrix can generated using get_snp_dist_matrix function. object can generated : hclust(.dist(snp_dist)). tree phylogenetic tree object class phylo constructed DNA alignment. snp_thresh threshold defining clusters.

title: Perform clustering of isolates using a hard SNP distance cutoff. — get_tn_clusters_snp_thresh
text: numeric vector indicating cluster isolate belongs .

title: Perform clustering of isolates using a hard SNP distance cutoff. — get_tn_clusters_snp_thresh
text: function uses hard SNP distance cutoff define clusters. first cuts tree specified threshold assigns cluster best matching subtree. best matching subtree determined counting many sequences cluster subtree. cluster one sequence, assigned smallest matching subtree. See vignette("transclust") details.

title: Identify transmission clusters based on the number of shared variants. — get_tn_clusters_sv_index
code: get_tn_clusters_sv_index(   dna_aln,   snp_dist,   ip_seqs,   ip_pt_seqs,   seq2pt,   dates,   tree )

title: Identify transmission clusters based on the number of shared variants. — get_tn_clusters_sv_index
text: dna_aln DNA alignment object class DNAbin. snp_dist matrix SNP distances isolates constructed using model DNA evolution. See get_snp_dist_matrix useful function generate . ip_seqs vector sequence IDs correspond intake patient sequences presumed imported. ip_pt_seqs vector sequence IDs correspond intake-positive patients. seq2pt named vector linking sequence IDs patient IDs. dates vector isolate dates named sequence IDs. tree phylogenetic tree object class phylo constructed DNA alignment. can constructed using get_phylo_tree can tree object constructed isolates.

title: Identify transmission clusters based on the number of shared variants. — get_tn_clusters_sv_index
text: numeric vector indicating cluster isolate belongs .

title: Identify transmission clusters based on the number of shared variants. — get_tn_clusters_sv_index
text: Clustering performed identify maximal clusters containing single intake-positive patient occurs cluster converts. clustering metric number shared variants, clusters can multiple intake-positive patients share identical number variants cluster members intake-positive patients occur converts. clustering also requires clusters defined least one shared variant isolates . See vignette("transclust") details.

title: Identify transmission clusters based on the number of shared variants. — get_tn_clusters_sv_index
text: Hawken, S. E., Yelin, R. D., Lolans, K., Pirani, ., Weinstein, R. ., Lin, M. Y., Hayden, M. K., & Snitkin, E. S. (2022). Threshold-free genomic cluster detection track transmission pathways health-care settings: genomic epidemiology analysis. Lancet Microbe, 3(9), e652–e662. doi:10.1016/S2666-5247(22)00115-X

title: Analyze Intra-Cluster Genetic Variation — intra_cluster_genetic_var_analysis
text: function analyzes genetic diversity within clusters identifying variant sites calculating mutational spectra (e.g. transition transversion rates). uses DNA alignment vector cluster assignments (named sequence IDs) returns data frame summarizing diversity measures cluster well overall population.

title: Analyze Intra-Cluster Genetic Variation — intra_cluster_genetic_var_analysis
Analyze Intra-Cluster Genetic Variation — intra_cluster_genetic_var_analysis
text: clusters named vector cluster assignments (cluster IDs) names corresponding sequence IDs. dna_aln matrix (data frame) representing DNA sequence alignment, rows sequences (named sequence IDs) columns represent nucleotide positions.

title: Analyze Intra-Cluster Genetic Variation — intra_cluster_genetic_var_analysis
text: data frame one row per cluster (plus row overall population) containing number variable sites rates six mutation types. Mutation rates rounded two decimals.

text: DNA object cleaned sequence names.

title: Read in Sequence Alignment — read_in_seq_aln
text: function performs following steps: Reads DNA sequences specified FASTA file. Cleans sequence names removing specific substrings patterns. Replaces certain sequence names predefined values. Prints cleaned sequence names. Assigns cleaned sequence names DNA object.
